description: This file contains unit tests for the Swipe utility, testing swipe gestures, event handling, and support detection in a browser environment.

methods.name: defineDocumentElementOntouchstart
methods.description: Defines a noop function for ontouchstart on document.documentElement to simulate touch support.

methods.name: deleteDocumentElementOntouchstart
methods.description: Removes the ontouchstart property from document.documentElement.

methods.name: mockSwipeGesture
methods.description: Simulates a swipe gesture on an element with specified options and gesture type.
